name: The Big Saturn
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｔｈｅ ｂｉｇ ＳＡＴＵＲＮ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ・ビッグ・サターン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned from the hand or Deck. Once per turn: You can discard 1 card and pay 1000 Life Points; this card gains 1000 ATK until the End Phase. When this card in your possession is destroyed by your opponent's card effect and sent to your Graveyard: Both players take damage equal to this card's ATK in the Graveyard.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned from the hand or Deck. Once per turn: You can discard 1 card and pay 1000 Life Points; this card gains 1000 ATK until the End Phase. When this card in your possession is destroyed by your opponent's card effect and sent to your Graveyard: Both players take damage equal to this card's ATK in the Graveyard.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned from the hand or Deck. Once per turn: You can discard 1 card and pay 1000 Life Points; this card gains 1000 ATK until the End Phase. When this card in your possession is destroyed by your opponent's card effect and sent to your Graveyard: Both players take damage equal to this card's ATK in the Graveyard.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Cannot be Special Summoned from the hand
Cannot be Special Summoned from the Deck
